inline_comments: Resolve provider-specific extra params from model config. Used to pass through stream params like temperature/maxTokens. @internal Exported for testing only
Apply extra params (like temperature) to an agent's streamFn. Also applies verified provider-specific request wrappers, such as OpenRouter attribution. @internal Exported for testing
Preserve the legacy Moonshot compatibility path when no plugin wrapper
actually handled the stream function. This covers tests/disabled plugins
and Ollama Cloud Kimi models until they gain a dedicated runtime hook.
Work around upstream pi-ai hardcoding `store: false` for Responses API.
Force `store=true` for direct OpenAI Responses models and auto-enable
server-side compaction for compatible OpenAI Responses payloads.

functions.name: resolveExtraParams
functions.doc: Resolve provider-specific extra params from model config.   Used to pass through stream params like temperature.      Ex

functions.name: applyExtraParamsToAgent
functions.doc: Apply extra params (like temperature) to an agent's streamFn.   Also applies verified provider-specific request wrappers
